name: Documentation Review

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Documentation Review is complete and correct

scope: Comprehensive documentation audit. Verify all docs/humans/ pages match reality, all docs/specs/ are current or marked superseded, CONTRIBUTING.md package map is accurate, README feature list is complete, AGENTS.md critical rules are correct, docs/agents/architecture.md reflects current dependency graph. Major changes since last review: config schema rewritten (stages as dict), 10+ new CLI commands (config show, audit aar, audit report), prompt subdirectory restructure, AARs and spec review as new pipeline concepts, status --detail flag, unknown-field detection, stall detector, selfHeal blocked audit remediation, CHILDREF_STATE_MISMATCH in doctor, archive lifecycle.
success_criteria: Every docs/specs/ file is either accurate, updated, or marked superseded
CONTRIBUTING.md package map lists all internal/ packages with correct descriptions
README feature list covers all capabilities added since last review
AGENTS.md critical rules are verified against code and complete
docs/agents/architecture.md dependency graph matches actual import structure
All docs/humans/ pages reflect current CLI behavior including new commands and flags

breadcrumbs.text: Created 4 children: specs-currency-audit, agent-docs-audit, human-docs-audit, root-docs-audit. Ordering: specs first (foundational truth source), then agent docs (technical accuracy), then human docs (user-facing), then root docs (summary-level). Each leaf independently verifiable. Major drift risks identified: stages-as-dict in config spec, 5 missing packages in CONTRIBUTING.md, new CLI commands undocumented, auto-archive ADR not yet reflected in goroutine spec.

escalations.description: findnexttask-invariants.md spec exists in docs/specs/ but is missing from the README index. Pre-existing omission, not introduced by this node.

PreStartSelfHeal is still referenced in docs/agents/state-and-types.md:82 and docs/agents/daemon.md:69-71 but the function does not exist in the codebase. These references were introduced by commits 51038fa and ebfc370 (a different node), not by root-docs-audit.
internal/archive/service_test.go has a gofmt formatting violation (map literal alignment). Introduced by commit 2a31bf0 from a different node.
